meta_title: Fight a Careless Driving Ticket in Edmonton | Fabsy
meta_description: Local guide to fighting careless driving tickets in Edmonton. Free eligibility check, disclosure requests, and trusted representation.
h1: Fight a Careless Driving Ticket in Edmonton

faqs.a: It costs a flat $488 to fight your ticket, plus 30% of any fine reduction we win. No reduction, no fees beyond the $488.
Usually not, we appear on your behalf for most violations. We will notify you if attendance is required.
faqs.q: Do I need to appear in court?

faqs.a: The process typically takes 3-6 months from submission to resolution.
